banner.connecting: Kubatanidza kuTor — zvichakara zvichirodhwa kusvikira zvasvika.
banner.failed: Hatina kukwanisa kubatanidza kuTor — zvichakara zvakavharwa kusvikira zvabatanidza.

imageCrop.title: Cheka Mufananidzo
imageCrop.hint: Dhonza kuti uchinje nzvimbo · Manya kana kufambisa kuti ukurise

messages.title: Mameseji
messages.subtitle: Mameseji ako akavanzika akakodheswa.
messages.empty: Hapana mameseji parizvino. Nhaurirano dzaunazvo dzichaonekwa pano.
messages.selectPrompt: Sarudza nhaurirano kuti uverenge mameseji ako.
messages.unsupported: Nzira yako yazvino yekupinda haitsigire mameseji akavanzika akakodheswa.
messages.muteDialogDescription: Izvi zvichawedzera {{name}} kurondedzero yako yevakanyaradzwa uye zvobvisa nhaurirano iyi kubva muMameseji. Unogona kuvabvisa pakunyaradzwa gare gare kubva murondedzero yako.
messages.translateDialogDescription: Mameseji agamuchirwa achaendeswa kusevhisi yako yekushandura yawakagadzirisa. Mameseji atumirwa haazodudzirwi. Eranos icharangarira sarudzo iyi pachigadzirwa ichi.
messages.recipientHint: Tsvaga munhu kuti utange nhaurirano itsva.
messages.noRecipientResults: Hapana vanhu vawanikwa. Edza rimwe zita, NIP-05, kana npub.

auth.invalidBunkerFormat: Fomati ye URI ye bunker isina kunaka.
auth.errorInvalidSecretKey: Kiyi yakavanzika isina kunaka. Inofanira kutanga ne nsec1.
auth.errorFileNoKey: Faira harina kiyi yakavanzika iri nani.
auth.errorBunkerConnect: Hazvina kukwanisa kubatanidza. Ongorora URI ye bunker.

role.title: Chii chakuunza pano?
role.subtitle: Unogona kuita zvose zviri zviviri gare gare. Izvi zvinongotibatsira kurongedza matanho anotevera.

creator.title: Tanga mushandirapamwe
creator.finderNote: Vapi vanotumira GRIN zvakananga kuchikwama chako.

donor.title: Ipa kumishandirapamwe
donor.finderNote: Mupiro wako unoenda zvakananga kuchikwama chemurongi.

verifier.title: Simbisa mishandirapamwe
verifier.finderNote: Vapi vanoona bheji pamishandirapamwe yaunovimba nayo.

keygen.title: Kiyi yako ndiwo muviri wako
keygen.description: Tichagadzira kiyi yakavanzika yako iwe wega. Ndiyo nzira yega yokupinda — pasina email, pasina password.

secure.title: Chengetedza kiyi yako
secure.subtitle: Daunirodha faira ugorichengeta panzvimbo yakachengetedzeka. Password manager inoshanda zvakanaka.
secure.couplingNote: Kiyi iyi ndihwo hunhu hwako paEranos. Inosaina maposvo ako eNostr, makambeni ako, uye marisiti ezvipo anoverengerwa muhuwandu hwemakambeni.
secure.permanenceHeadline: Hapana nzira yekudzosa kiyi iyi kana ukairasa.
secure.permanenceBody: Hapana kuireseta, hapana nhare yerubatsiro, hapana kudzoswa neemail. Ichengete usati waenderera mberi.
secure.downloadFailedDescription: Hatina kukwanisa kudaunirodha faira rekiyi. Ndapota ikope nemaoko.

profile.title: Ita seyako
profile.subtitle: Udza vamwe zvishoma pamusoro pako. Zvose zvichisarudzwa, chinja chero nguva.
profile.campaignSubtitle: Zita nemufananidzo zvinobatsira vanhu kubatana nemushandirapamwe wako.
profile.publishFailedDescription: Akaunti yako yagadzirwa asi profile haina kukwanisa kuchengetwa. Unogona kuivandudza gare gare.

identity.title: Gadzirira sangano rako
identity.subtitle: Zita nelogo zvinodiwa. Webhusaiti nebhana zvinosarudzika.
identity.websiteInvalid: Isa webhusaiti inoshanda inotanga ne https://
identity.pasteUrlInvalid: Clipboard haina URL ye https inoshanda.
identity.pasteUrlFetchFailed: Hatina kukwanisa kurodha mufananidzo iwoyo. Tarisa URL woedza zvakare.

verifier.publishFailedDescription: Akaunti yako yagadzirira, asi profile yesangano haina kukwanisa kuburitswa. Unogona kuipedzisa gare gare uchibva mumarongero.

statement.title: Buritsa chirevo chako chemusimbisi
statement.subtitle: Tsanangura mautariro aunoita mishandirapamwe usati wapupura. Chinoburitswa pachena kuti vapi vavimbe nebheji rako.

howto.title: Mashandisirwo ekusimbisa mushandirapamwe
howto.subtitle: Wagadzirira zvose. Heano mashandisirwo ekupupurira mushandirapamwe kana waumusimbisa.

feed.indexTagline: Zviri zvako. Mafambisirwo ako. Mitemo yako.

empty.homeAgora: Nguva yakanyarara paEranos. Mishando mitsva, zvivimbiso, mipo, nezvinyorwa zvichaonekwa pano sezvinozoitika.
empty.homeFollowingLoggedIn: Feed yako yokutevera haina chinhu. Tevera vamwe vanhu kuti uone zvavari kuita, kana kuchinjira kuEranos kana Pasi rose.
empty.homeFollowingLoggedOut: Pinda kuti uone zvinyorwa zvevanhu vauri kutevera.
empty.homeOther: Hapana chokuratidza. Tarisa hukama hwerelay yako kana kuedza zvakare munguva pfupi.
empty.follows: Feed yako haina chinhu. Tevera vamwe vanhu kuti uone zvinyorwa zvavo pano.
empty.global: Hapana zvinyorwa zvakawanikwa. Tarisa hukama hwerelay yako kana kudzoka manje.

modeSwitcher.loginRequired: Pinda kuti uone zvinyorwa zvevanhu vauri kutevera

organizationContext.editSubtext: Zvauchagadzirisa zvicharamba zvakabatana nebasa repamutemo regroup iyi.
organizationContext.malformedParam: Hatina kukwanisa kuverenga group iri mulink. Zvichaburitswa pasi peakaundi yako.
organizationContext.unauthorized: Hausi muvambi kana moderator wegroup iyoyo. Zvichaburitswa pasi peakaundi yako.

list.seoDescription: Tsidzira mari kuzviito, humbowo, kana zvinobuda zvauri kuda kukurudzira.
list.heroBody: Tsigira mari kuzviito, humbowo, uye zvibereko. Vanhu vanopindura nemikana yavo, uye nharaunda inopa mubayiro pabasa rinofambisa chinangwa mberi.
list.allPledgesTagline: Zvakatarisirwa nevatariri. Tsvaga kana kuronga kuti utarise chitsidziro chega chega.
list.noMatchHint: Edza chimwe chinotsvagwa, kana ubvise kutsvaga.
list.needsReviewDesc: Zvitsidziro zve{{appName}} zvisati zvanyorwa kana kuvanzwa. Simudza chimwe kushelf yanokurumbira kana kuchiderera nokuvigwa.
list.hiddenDesc: Zvitsidziro zvakadzvinyirirwa kubva mukuwanikwa pachena. Shandisa menu yekebab pakadhi kuti ubvise kuvanzwa.

card.confirmDelete: Bvisa chitsidziro ichi? Izvi hazvigoni kudzosererwa.

create.seoDescription: Gadzira chitsidziro chemupi kuti ukurudzire chiito chinokosha pa{{appName}}.
create.loginGateBody: Zvitsidziro zviitiko zveNostr zvakasaina. Unoda kupinda muNostr kuti uburitse chimwe.
create.heading: Gadzira chitsidziro
create.title: Musoro
create.descriptionPlaceholder: Tsanangura chiito, humbowo, kana mhedzisiro yauri kuda kukurudzira, zvinofanira kuva muzvirongwa, uye uchazviongorora sei...
create.timezoneNote: Nguva yekutanga neyemugumo zvichaverengerwa munzvimbo yenguva iyi.
create.errorLoginRequired: Unofanira kunge wakapinda kuti ugadzire chitsidziro.
create.errorPledgeInvalid: Mari yechitsidziro inofanira kunge iri USD inopfuura zero.
create.errorPriceUnavailable: Kumirira mutengo wekutsinhanisa kuti tiverenge huwandu hwechipikirwa.
create.errorCoverInvalid: Mufananidzo wepamusoro unofanira kuva URL ye https:// chaiyo.

wizard.titleStepSubtitle: Chikumbiro chiri pachena nedudziro pfupi yezvauchatsigira.
wizard.pledgeStepSubtitle: Mari yauchabhadhara, muUSD, uye mugumo unosarudzwa.
wizard.coverStepSubtitle: Mufananidzo mumwe chete unotakura chitsidziro pakadhi rega rega.
wizard.tagsStepSubtitle: Batsira vanhu vakakodzera kuwana chitsidziro chako.

detail.submissionPlaceholder: Govera humbowo, uchapupu, kana basa rapera...
detail.noSubmissionsHint: Iva wekutanga kupindura nehumbowo, uchapupu, kana basa rapera.
detail.storyEmpty: Akapa chitsidziro haasati anyora rondedzero yechitsidziro ichi.

list.seoDescription: Wana woziva uye joiner mapoka paNostr
list.heroBody: Gadzira mapoka, unganidza nhengo, uye ramba uchitarisa zviri kuitika munzvimbo dzako.
list.createGroupLoginBody: Kugadzira boka kunoburitsa chiitiko cheNostr kubva muakaundi yako.
list.allGroupsTagline: Zvakatarisirwa nevatariri. Tsvaga kana kuronga kuti utarise boka rega rega.
list.loginToSeeBody: Mapoka awakatanga kana aunotungamira achaonekwa pano.
list.noGroupsBody: Gadzira boka rako kuti utange kurongedza mishandirapamwe, zvitsidziro, nezviitiko nevanhu vako.
list.noFeaturedBody: Vatungamiri ve{{appName}} vanonyora mapoka akakurumbira pano. Dzoka pasinaapfuura nguva.
list.needsReviewDesc: Mapoka e{{appName}} asati anyorwa kana kuvanzwa. Simudza rimwe kushelf yanokurumbira kana kuriderera nokuvigwa.
list.hiddenDesc: Mapoka akadzvinyirirwa kubva mukuwanikwa pachena. Shandisa menu yekebab pakadhi kuti ubvise kuvanzwa.
list.noMatchHint: Edza chimwe chinotsvagwa, kana ubvise kutsvaga.

create.loginGateBody: Mapoka zviitiko zveNostr zvakasaina. Unoda kupinda muNostr kuti uburitse rimwe.
create.invalidEditBody: Rink iyi yokugadzirisa boka hapana nzvimbo yeboka yakakodzera.
create.cannotEditBody: Mutangi weboka chete ndiye anogona kurivandudza.
create.name: Zita
create.errorLoginRequired: Unofanira kunge wakapinda kuti ugadzire boka.
create.errorEditNotOwner: Mutangi weboka chete ndiye anogona kurigadzirisa.
create.errorNameInvalid: Zita rinofanira kuva nemavara kana manhamba kuti URL yeboka igadzirike.
create.errorEditLatestMissing: Hatina kuwana shanduro yazvino yeboka iri kuti tirivandudze.
create.errorCoverInvalid: Mufananidzo wepamusoro unofanira kuva URL ye https:// chaiyo.
create.errorSlugCollision: Une kare boka rine kupiwa zita kwe«{{slug}}». Sarudza rimwe zita.

wizard.nameStepSubtitle: Zita pfupi, riri pachena, ravachaziva nhengo.
wizard.coverStepSubtitle: Mufananidzo mumwe chete unotakura boka pakadhi rega rega.
wizard.moderatorsStepSubtitle: Zvinosarudzwa — vanogona kutendera zvinyorwa nokubvisa nhengo pamwe newe.
wizard.tagsStepSubtitle: Batsira vanhu vakakodzera kuwana boka rako.

detail.launchCampaignDescription: Unganidza mari nepeji reboka riri official.

campaignsCreate.seoDescriptionEdit: Vandudza campaign yako yekuunganidza mari pa{{appName}}.
campaignsCreate.loginGateBody: Macampaign zviitiko zveNostr zvakasaina. Unoda kupinda muNostr kuti uburitse rimwe.
campaignsCreate.invalidEditBody: Rink iyi yokugadzirisa campaign hapana nzvimbo yecampaign yakakodzera.
campaignsCreate.cannotEditBody: Munyori wecampaign chete ndiye anogona kuvandudza.
campaignsCreate.title: Musoro
campaignsCreate.storyPlaceholder: Govera nhoroondo, anobatsirwa, uye kuti mari ichashandiswa sei.
campaignsCreate.successEditDesc: Shanduko dzekuunganidza mari kwako dziri kushanda.
campaignsCreate.errorLoginRequired: Unofanira kunge wakapinda kuti ugadzire campaign.
campaignsCreate.errorEditNotOwner: Munyori wecampaign chete ndiye anogona kuigadzirisa.
campaignsCreate.errorTitleInvalid: Musoro unofanira kuva nemavara kana manhamba kuti URL yecampaign igadzirike.
campaignsCreate.errorSlugInvalid: Kupiwa zita kunofanira kunge kune mavara madiki, manhamba, uye dashes.
campaignsCreate.errorGoalInvalid: Chinangwa chinofanira kunge chiri madhora akakwana anopfuura zero.
campaignsCreate.errorEditLatestMissing: Hatina kuwana shanduro yazvino yecampaign iyi kuti tirivandudze.
campaignsCreate.errorSlugCollision: Une kare campaign ine kupiwa zita kwe«{{slug}}». Sarudza rimwe.
campaignsCreate.errorBannerInvalid: Bhana inofanira kuva URL ye https:// chaiyo.
campaignsCreate.errorPublishedInvalid: Chiitiko chakaburitswa chatadza chenjedzo. Tapota refresh moedza zvakare.

wizard.titleStepSubtitle: Zita pfupi, riri pachena, ravapi vachaziva.
wizard.bannerStepSubtitle: Mufananidzo mumwe chete unotapira unotakura campaign pakadhi rega rega.
wizard.storyStepSubtitle: Vanobatsirwa ndivanaani uye mari ichashandiswa sei.
wizard.goalStepSubtitle: Zvisina kumanikidzwa — siya pasina kuti uite campaign isina mugumo.
wizard.tagsStepSubtitle: Batsira vanhu vakakodzera kuwana campaign yako.

campaignsDetail.deletedToastDesc: Chikumbiro chekubvisa chakaburitswa. Marelay anozvibata zvakanaka achabvisa campaign mufeeds.
campaignsDetail.deleteDialogBody: Izvi zvinoburitsa chikumbiro chekubvisa cheNIP-09. Marelay anozvibata zvakanaka achabvisa campaign mufeeds nezvirink zvakananga. Rezvi dzezvipo dzapfuura dzinoramba dzakachengetwa pachain. Izvi hazvigoni kudzosererwa — kuti urambe uchigamuchira zvipo, gadzirisa campaign panzvimbo yokuti uibvise.

campaignVerification.attestation: Nekusimbisa mushandirapamwe uyu unopupura kuti mushandirapamwe ndewechokwadi uye wechokwadi. Unoziva mukuru wemushandirapamwe pachako kana kuti wakasimbisa zvine musoro kuti zvavanotaura ndezvechokwadi. Chenjera vanhu vanonyepedzera uye makororo.

create.loginBody: Zviitiko maNostr events akasainwa. Unoda kupinda muNostr kuti ubudise chimwe.
create.heading: Gadzira chiitiko
create.descriptionPlaceholder: Udza vanhu zvavanotarisira, zvavanofanira kuuya nazvo, uye vanofanira kuuya ndivanaani...
create.allDayHint: Dzima kuti uwedzere nguva yekutanga neyekupera.
create.locationPlaceholder: Kero, nzvimbo, kana link yevideo call
create.errorStartTimeRequired: Nguva yekutanga inodikanwa pazviitiko zvine nguva.
create.errorCoverInvalid: Mufananidzo wepamusoro unofanira kuva https:// URL inoshanda.
create.errorEndDateBeforeStart: Zuva rekupedzisira rinofanira kuva pazuva rekutanga kana mushure maro.
create.errorStartDateTimeInvalid: Zuva kana nguva yekutanga haisi kushanda.
create.errorEndTimeAfterStart: Nguva yekupera inofanira kuva mushure menguva yekutanga.

detail.emptyDescription: Murongi haasati awedzera tsananguro yechiitiko ichi.

home.heroBody: Unganidza Grin yakananga kubva kuvatsigiri vepasi rose. Mupiro mumwe nemumwe unopinda zvakananga muchikwama chako, pasina vamiririri, pasina kudzoreredza, uye pasina platform inobata mari yako.
home.hiddenDesc: Mishandirapamwe yakabviswa papeji rekutanga reveruzhinji. Shandisa menu pakadhi kuti uibvise pakuvanzwa.
home.yourCampaignsDesc: Mishandirapamwe yako iri panetwork yeNostr uye mipiro inoshanda kuburikidza nemurawu wemushandirapamwe. Tarisa mishandirapamwe yose pa/campaigns; boka re{{appName}} rinosarudza yakananga papeji rekutanga.
home.emptyHint: Iva wekutanga kutanga kuunganidza mari pa{{appName}}. Taura nyaya yako, sarudza vanobatsirwa, uchipa rwumwe rwekugovera.

whyDifferent.title: Yakavakwa zvakasiyana.
whyDifferent.lede: Grin yakananga kubva kumupi ichienda kumugamuchiri. Hapana puratifomu pakati, hapana muchengeti akabata homwe, hapana mvumo inodiwa.

block1.heading: Kusiyana neGoFundMe
block1.body: Hapana puratifomu inogona kudzivirira zvipo zvako, kukumbira kudzoserwa kwemari, kana kupedza mushandirapamwe wako pamusoro pekusawirirana kwemitemo. Hapana Stripe, hapana Visa, hapana bhanga riri pakati ringakucherekedza pakati pemushandirapamwe.

block2.heading: Kusiyana nedzimwe puratifomu dzecrypto
block2.body: Hapana chikwama chinochengetwa nevamwe, node inobatirwa, kana mubati wemibhadharo zvinogona kukundikana kana kuenda offline. Mari inogadziriswa pacheni yeGrin ichienda muchikwama chaunodzora. Kana {{appName}} ikanyangarika mangwana, mushandirapamwe wose unoramba uchishanda.
block2.bullet1: Hapana wallet yokuchengetedza inogona kupedzwa kana kudzivirirwa
block2.bullet2: Inotsoropodzwa pamuchina kuenda muwallet yauno tora

home.noMatchHint: Edza chimwe chinotsvagwa, kana ubvise kutsvaga.

all.title: Mishandirapamwe
all.sectionTagline: Mishandirapamwe yakasarudzwa pakutanga, yotevedzwa nemamwe ose epanetwork. Tsvaga kana kuronga kuti utsanangure.
all.heroBody: Mishandirapamwe yose yakaburitswa paNostr, yakaunganidzwa panzvimbo imwe chete. Tarisa network yose, wana chinangwa chinokukosha, uye uchitsigire wakananga neGrin.
all.noMatchHint: Edza zvimwe zvinotsvagwa, kana ubvise kutsvaga kuti uone mishandirapamwe yose.
all.allHiddenHint: Mishandirapamwe yose pamutambo yakavanzwa nevatariri. Vhura «Ratidza dzakavanzwa» kuti uione.
all.emptyHint: Hapana mushandirapamwe wakatumirwa parizvino. Iva wokutanga.

lists.createDesc: Gadzira rondedzero itsva yemisoro. Sarudza mishandirapamwe muiri kubva papeji ipi neipi yemushandirapamwe.
lists.editDesc: Gadziridza zita, tsananguro, kana chiratidzo cherondedzero.
lists.deleteConfirmDesc: "{{title}}" ichabviswa pamutsetse wemisoro. Mishandirapamwe pachayo haisi kubatwa.
lists.descriptionPlaceholder: Mashoko mashoma anotsanangura zviri murondedzero iyi.
lists.addCampaignDesc: Tsvaga panetwork uye sarudza mushandirapamwe wekuwedzera kurondedzero iyi.
lists.membershipDesc: Sarudza kuti "{{title}}" inofanira kuonekwa muzvirondedzero zvipi.
lists.membershipEmpty: Hapana rondedzero parizvino. Gadzira imwe kuti utange kusarudza.
lists.emptyMod: Rondedzero iyi haina chinhu. Wedzera mishandirapamwe kuti utange kuisarudza.

iconPicker.title: Sarudza chiratidzo
iconPicker.description: Sarudza chiratidzo chipi nechipi kubva muraibhurari yeLucide.

sections.networkDesc: Kushandiswa kwedata, marelays, nemaserver ekuiswa kwemafaira.
sections.organizersDesc: Sarudza vagadziri venyika vanogona kuomesa zvitumbi pamufuto wenyika.

network.title: Network
network.subtitle: Tarisira kushandiswa kwedata, marelays, nemaserver ekuiswa kwemafaira.
network.reduceDataUsageDesc: YeKubatana kunoyerwa kana kwakanonoka. Mavhidhiyo haaite kutamba ega, zviratidziro zvemavhidhiyo zviri shure zvinosiyiwa, uye mifananidzo inomirira kubatwa pamberi pekutakurwa.
network.useImageProxyDesc: Inotora mhando duku dzeWebP dzemifananidzo pane masikirwo akakwana.
network.proxyApiDesc: Inofanira kutaura <0>wsrv.nl / weserv</0> API. Vanozvichengeta vega vanogona kuinongedza kuchikamu chavo.
network.uploadQualityDesc: «Compressed» inopfupisa mifananidzo mikuru ichisarudza format diki. «Original» inoisa mifananidzo sezvairi.

advanced.title: Zvepamusoro
advanced.subtitle: Marongero esystem nezvimwe zvisarudzo zvepamusoro zvevashandisi venyanzvi.
advanced.torToggleDesc: Inobatanidza kune marelay uye inorodha media pamusoro peNetwork yeTor kuti uwane kuchengetedzeka kwakasimba. Tarisira kushanda kwakarefu uye kugumira kadiki Tor ichiri kubatanidza.
advanced.torApplyNote: Kuvhura izvi kunofambisa traffic yose kuburikidza neTor. Ichiri kubatanidza, zvimwe zvichakara hazvizorohwi (bhana inoratidzwa ichiratidza mamiriro) — hapana chinhumwa kunze kweTor. Kudzima kunodzizoresa kubatanidza kwakanga kwakagara.

language.title: Mutauro
language.subtitle: Sarudza mutauro unoshandiswa muapp yose.
language.translationNote: Shanduro dzichiri kuitwa. Mavara asina kushandurwa anozoonekwa muChirungu.

verifier.title: Musimbisi
verifier.subtitle: Iva musimbisi nokutsanangura mautariro aunoita mishandirapamwe.
verifier.prompt: Tiudze matanho aunotora kusimbisa mishandirapamwe. Sanganisa ruzivo rwakawanda sezvinobvira kuti vapi vazive kuti vanogona kuvimba nokutonga kwako.
verifier.placeholder: Tsanangura mautariro aunoita mishandirapamwe — kuongorora kwaunoita, humbowo hwaunoda, mautariro aunoita kusimbisa chizvarwa chemurongi, nezvimwe zvose zvinobatsira vapi kuvimba nokutonga kwako.
verifier.errorToast: Hatina kukwanisa kuchengeta chirevo chako chemusimbisi.
verifier.disclaimer: Munhu wese anogona kuva musimbisi. Chirevo chako chinoburitswa pachena kuNostr uye chinoratidzwa pachena pa profile yako. Hachipi mvumo dzakasiyana — chinongoudza vapi mautariro aunoita mishandirapamwe.
verifier.loginGateBody: Unofanira kunge wakapinda kuti uburitse chirevo chemusimbisi.
verifier.withdrawConfirmBody: Chirevo chako che"Matiro Atinosimbisa Nawo" chichabviswa pa profile yako. Unogona kuburitsa chitsva chero nguva.

organizations.seoDescription: Pinza sangano rako mu{{appName}}, uburitse chirevo cheruzhinji chekusimbisa, uye uwane kuvimbwa nevanopa.

hero.body: Unza sangano rako mu{{appName}} uye uburitse chirevo cheruzhinji chinotsanangura mautariro aunoita mishandirapamwe yaunotsigira. Hapana chikumbiro, hapana vavhure-musuwo — mukurumbira wako ndiwo unoita basa.

steps.title: Pinda mumatanho matatu
steps.lede: {{appName}} yakavakwa paNostr, saka sangano rako rinouya nehunhu hwaro pacharo. Kugadzirira kunotora maminitsi.

step1.title: Unza purofairi yako
step1.body: Pinda nepurofairi yeNostr yesangano rako — kana kuti gadzira imwe musekondi. Hunhu hwako ndehwako, hunotakurika pamapurogiramu ese eNostr, uye hahutongwi ne{{appName}}.

step2.title: Tsanangura maitiro ako
step2.body: Nyora chirevo cheruzhinji chinotsanangura mautariro aunoongorora mishandirapamwe: kuongorora kwaunoita, humbowo hwaunoda, uye maitiro aunosimbisa hunhu hwemuronga.

step3.title: Buritsa uye uwane kuvimbwa
step3.body: Chirevo chako chinoonekwa papurofairi yako uye chinoratidza vanopa kuti unotsigira mishandirapamwe yaunosimbisa. Gadziridza kana kubvisa chero nguva.

getStarted.title: Buritsa chirevo chako
getStarted.lede: Pinda nepurofairi yesangano rako kuti uburitse, ugadziridze, kana kubvisa chirevo chako chekusimbisa.

organizations.loginGateBody: Pinda nepurofairi yeNostr yesangano rako, kana kuti gadzira imwe, kuti utange. Kana wapinda, unogona kuburitsa chirevo chako chekusimbisa pano.

tutorial.title: Mashandisirwo ekusimbisa mushandirapamwe
tutorial.lede: Chirevo chako chava pachena. Heano matanho ekutsigira mushandirapamwe waunovimba nawo — zvinotora kubata kaviri chete kubva pakadhi rapi nerapi remushandirapamwe.

open.title: Vhura menyu
open.body: Pakadhi ripi neripi remushandirapamwe, baya bhatani remadhoti matatu kona yekumusoro kurudyi kwebhanga.

verify.title: Sarudza "Simbisa mushandirapamwe uyu"
verify.body: Menyu inoratidza chiito chekusimbisa — chinoonekwa chete nevatariri nevaongorori sewe.

confirm.title: Simbisa uye wapedza
confirm.body: Pupura kuti mushandirapamwe ndewechokwadi. Bheji rako rinobatana nekadhi kuti vanopa vazive kuti unowutsigira.

getStartedCard.title: Gadzirira sangano rako
getStartedCard.body: Tichakutungamirira mukugadzira profile yesangano rako, kuburitsa chirevo chako chekusimbisa, uye kusimbisa mushandirapamwe wako wekutanga.

organizers.appointDesc: Ipa muridzi mvumo yekuomesa zvitumbi pamufuto wenyika yakatarwa.
organizers.alreadyOrganizer: Muridzi uyu atova mugadziri wenyika iyoyo
organizers.adminRequiredDesc: Vatariri vechikuva chete ndivo vanogona kusarudza kana kubvisa vagadziri.

errors.denied: Mvumo yekamera yakarambwa. Ibvumire mukurongedza kwako kuti uskene makodhi eQR.
errors.busy: Imwe app iri kushandisa kamera. Ivhare wozoedza zvakare.
errors.didntStart: Kamera haina kutanga. Imwe app inogona kunge iri kuishandisa, kana browser yako yakanga yavhara skena.

notifSettings.title: Zviziviso

enablePush.label: Vhura zviziviso zvepush
enablePush.description: Gamuchira zviziviso pamusoro pemabasa pazvinyorwa zvako

notifSettings.denied: Zviziviso zvakavharirwa. Vandudza zvirongwa zvebrowser yako kuti zvibvumire zviziviso kubva pasaiti iyi.

deliveryMethod.heading: Nzira yokuendesa
deliveryMethod.intro: Sarudza kuti zviziviso zvinoendeswa sei kumudziyo wako.

push.label: Push
push.description: Zviziviso zvakajairika. Hapana mucherechedzo unogara pabar yemamiriro.

persistent.label: Inogara
persistent.description: Inobvunza marelays zvakananga shure kweimwe nzvimbo zvichida zviziviso zvitsva. Shandisa izvi kuti uwane kuendeswa kunovimbika pamidziyo isina rutsigiro rwezviziviso zvepush.

onlyFollowing.label: Chete kubva kuvanhu vandinotevera
onlyFollowing.description: Vanza zviziviso kubva kuma akaundi auwanga usingatevere

reactions.label: Mhinduro
reactions.description: Kana mumwe munhu adavira kuzvinyorwa zvako

reposts.label: Kudzokorora
reposts.description: Kana mumwe munhu adzokorora nhau dzako

comments.label: Mhinduro nemibvunzo
comments.description: Kana mumwe munhu apa mhinduro kana kudavira kuzvinyorwa zvako

highlights.label: Kusimudzira
highlights.description: Kana mumwe munhu akasimudzira zviri muzvinyorwa zvako

empty.posts: Hapana mhinduro dzakawanikwa dzinoenderana nokutsvaga kwako.
empty.postsPrompt: Isa mubvunzo wokutsvaga kuti uwane zviri muNostr.
empty.accounts: Hapana vashandisi vakawanikwa vanoenderana nokutsvaga kwako.
empty.followsPrompt: Tsvaga vanhu nezita kana kero yeNIP-05.
empty.agora: Hapana macampaign, pledges, kana mapoka eEranos akawanikwa anoenderana nokutsvaga kwako.
empty.agoraPrompt: Tsvaga macampaign, pledges, nemapoka eEranos, kana kutarisa zvitsva.

profile.couldNotResolveNip05: Hatina kukwanisa kuziva chiratidzo cheNIP-05 ichi.

activity.empty: Hapana zviitiko zva{{name}} parizvino. Zvinyorwa, mishando, zvivimbiso, nezvipo zvose zvinoratidzwa pano.

fields.heading: Ndima dzepfungidziro
fields.mediaPlaceholder: Isa faira kana namatira link yakananga

music.label: Mimhanzi
music.valuePlaceholder: Isa audhio kana namatira link yakananga

photo.label: Mufananidzo
photo.valuePlaceholder: Isa mufananidzo kana namatira link yakananga

video.label: Vhidhiyo
video.valuePlaceholder: Isa vhidhiyo kana namatira link yakananga

link.label: Link
link.description: Link kune chero saiti kana pfungidziro

warnings.audioWrongType: URL iyi haina kunongedzera kufaira reaudhio. Isa faira reaudhio kana shandisa link yakananga inopera ne .mp3, .ogg, .wav, nezvimwe.
warnings.audioUnknown: URL iyi ingangosashanda seaudio player. Kuti uwane mhinduro dzakanaka, isa faira uchishandisa bhatani kana namatira link yakananga kufaira reaudhio.
warnings.imageWrongType: URL iyi haina kunongedzera kumufananidzo. Isa mufananidzo kana shandisa link yakananga inopera ne .jpg, .png, .webp, nezvimwe.
warnings.imageUnknown: URL iyi ingangosaratidzwa semufananidzo. Kuti uwane mhinduro dzakanaka, isa faira uchishandisa bhatani kana namatira link yakananga kufaira remufananidzo.
warnings.videoWrongType: URL iyi haina kunongedzera kuvhidhiyo. Isa vhidhiyo kana shandisa link yakananga inopera ne .mp4, .webm, .mov, nezvimwe.
warnings.videoUnknown: URL iyi ingangosaratidzwa sevhidhiyo. Kuti uwane mhinduro dzakanaka, isa faira uchishandisa bhatani kana namatira link yakananga kufaira revhidhiyo.

key.heading: Kiyi yako
key.extensionBody: Wapinda uchishandisa extension yebrowser (NIP-07). Kiyi yako yakavanzika yakachengetwa ipapo — itarisire kana uitumire kuburikidza neextension iyoyo.
key.bunkerBody: Wapinda uchishandisa remote signer (NIP-46). Kiyi yako yakavanzika yakachengetwa ne signer iyoyo uye haigone kutumirwa kubva mu{{appName}}.
key.explainer: Kiyi yakavanzika iyi inotonga akaundi yako pa{{appName}}. Munhu wose anenge anayo anogona kunyora seunge ndiwe, kushandura makambeni ako, uye kuburitsa zvinhu muzita rako. Ichengetedze mumanager wepassword kana kuchimwe chinzvimbo iwe woga chaunokwanisa kuwana. Mari yako yeGrin yakazvimirira: inogara muchikwama chako cheGrin nemutsara wayo weseed, kwete mukiyi iyi.
key.warning: USAMBOpasanise kiyi yako yakavanzika kune chero munhu. Dzivirira kutora screenshot yayo kana kunamatira pamwe pose kunze kwemanager wepassword. Kana yagoverwa, vamwe vachakwanisa kuwana akaundi yako.
key.savedToFile: Kiyi yako yakavanzika yachengetwa muDocuments folder pamudziyo wako.
key.saveFailedDescription: Hazvina kubudirira kuchengeta kiyi. Ikope nemaoko.
key.copyFailedDescription: Hazvina kukwanisika kuwana clipboard. Ratidza kiyi wokopa nemaoko.

voice.micDeniedBody: Bvumira microphone kuti urekode meseji dzezwi.

destination.label: Tumira ku
destination.ariaHelp: Pane musiyano upi pakati pezvinyorwa zvepasi rose nezvenharaunda?
destination.globalExplainer: Chinyorwa chenguva dzose chinooneka nemunhu wose paNostr. Ani naani, kupi nekupi, anogona kuchiona.
destination.communityExplainer: Chinoratidzwa muFeed yenyika iyoyo pamwe nezvinyorwa zvevavakidzani. Chakanaka kwazvo kunyaya dzenharaunda.
destination.defaultUpdatedGlobal: Zvinyorwa zvitsva zvichange zviri zvepasi rose sezvinopiwa.

replyModal.blueskyDisclaimer: Vanhu paBluesky havakukuoni nokuti chaizvoizvo havasi vakapararira.

toast.countryUnpinFailed: Hazvina kubudirira kubvisa pakunamira kwete yenyika

deleteDialog.title: Dzima chinyorwa?
deleteDialog.description: Izvi zvichakumbira kudzima kubva kumarelay. Mamwe marelay anogona kuchengeta kopi yechiitiko chekutanga. Chiito ichi hachigone kudzoserwa.

privacy.seoDescription: Mutemo wezvakavanzika we{{appName}} — kuti data rako rinochengetwa sei pamhepo yeNostr
privacy.title: Mutemo wezvakavanzika

csae.seoDescription: Mutemo we{{appName}} pamusoro pokushungurudza nokushandiswa pabonde kwevana (CSAE) — kuzvipira kwedu pakuchengeteza vana paNostr
csae.title: Mutemo wokuchengeteza vana

donorGuide.seoDescription: Maitiro okupa pa{{appName}} uye maitiro okudzivirira zvakavanzika zvako.
donorGuide.title: Gwaro romupi
donorGuide.subtitle: Grin chaiyo, yakatumirwa zvakananga. Yose miitiro mupeji pfupi imwe.

recipientGuide.seoDescription: Maitiro okugamuchira zvipo pa{{appName}} uye kuzvibvisa muchivande.
recipientGuide.title: Gwaro romugamuchiri
recipientGuide.subtitle: Sarudza chaunoda kugamuchira, gamuchira zvipo, bvisa.

changelog.title: Rondedzero yeshanduko
changelog.preReleaseBody: Build iyi ine shanduko dzisati dzaiswa muburitsa.

about.seoDescription: Maitiro {{appName}} anoshanda nawo: kubatanidza vagamuchiri kune mari isingadziviswi kuburikidza neGrin neNostr.

hero.body: {{appName}} ipuratifomu yokupa isingadziviswi yakavakwa paNostr neGrin. Hapana maakaundi ebhanga akavharirwa. Hapana kuvharwa kwemakambani. Rutsigiro chete rwakananga kubva kuvanhu vanotenda muchikonzero chako.

sampleCard.imageAlt: Vanhu veVenezuela panhongedzo yemakenduru vakabata chiratidzo chinoti 'Liberen a todos los presos políticos · ¡Cese la represión!'
sampleCard.title: Sunungura Vasungwa vezvematongerwo enyika veVenezuela
sampleCard.description: Kuchengetedzwa kwemutemo neruzhinji rwemhuri kune vanopfuura 800 vasungwa vezvematongerwo enyika vakavharwa nehurumende yaMaduro.

howItWorks.title: Matanho matatu. Hapana mumiriri.
howItWorks.lede: Hapana mabanga, hapana miganhu, hapana mvumo.

step1.imageAlt: Kiyi yecryptographic yakapenya yeorange iri kuyangarara munzvimbo yerima, ichireva kuzvitonga
step1.title: Vagamuchiri vanonyora mukati memamiriro ekunze.
step1.body: Hapana bhanga. Hapana mapepa. Hapana kubvumirwa. Mugamuchiri anogadzira akaundi pa{{appName}}, owedzera kero yekugamuchira kubva muchikwama chake cheGrin kukambeni yake, uye anogona kugamuchira rutsigiro kubva chero kupi munyika.

step2.imageAlt: Mari yeGrin inopenya iri kubhururuka mumhepo nepamepu rerima renyika, ichireva mubhadharo wekukurumidza wepasi rose
step2.title: Vapi vanotumira Grin zvakananga.
step2.body: Vapi vanobhadhara kubva muchikwama chero chipi cheGrin, kuburikidza neGoblinPay checkout yekambeni kana zvakananga kukero yayo yegrin1 Slatepack. {{appName}} haitombobati mari. Chibvumirano chinobva muchikwama chemupi chichienda muchikwama chemugamuchiri.

step3.imageAlt: Ruoko rwakavhurwa rwune chiedza chinodziya cheorange chichipenya kubva mukati medziva ruoko, chichireva kugamuchira nesimba
step3.title: Rutsigiro runomira pakakosha.
step3.body: Mari inosvika kumugamuchiri zvakananga. Vanochengeta umiriri, vanochengeta kutonga. Famba nayo, chinjana, kana kushandisa; magwaro ari pasi anotsanangura maitiro okuita zvakavanzika uye zvakachengeteka.

chapter1.label: Kutanga
chapter1.description: Eranos chii, ndiani akaivaka, uye inomudza marii.

chapter2.label: Zvipo zveGrin
chapter2.description: Maitiro mibhadharo inoshanda nawo, sei Grin, zvinoramba zvakavanzika, uye kutarisana kwacho.

chapter3.label: Pamusoro peNostr
chapter3.description: Pirotokori yakavhurika iyo Eranos yakavakirwa, uye maitiro akaundi yako anoshanda.

guides.title: Sarudza divi rauri.
guides.lede: Chero iwe uchitumira kana kugamuchira, dzidza maitiro ako ekuita zvakachengeteka uye zvakavanzika.

donor.imageAlt: Vapikise vakapfeka chigwedu vachifamba mumugwagwa weguta reEurope panguva yemanheru, vakabata mwenje mitsvuku inopfuta nemibhureti 'FREEDOM' ne'LIBERTAD'
donor.title: Tsigira zvinangwa zvisinga tsigirwi nemabhanga.
donor.description: Tumira Grin zvakananga kuvagamuchiri nemafambiro kwese kupi pasi rose, usingakumbire mvumo kumubati wemibhadharo.
donor.bullet1: Bhadhara kubva muchikwama chero chipi cheGrin, seGoblin kana grin-wallet.
donor.bullet2: Zvipo zvinosvika zvakananga kumugamuchiri. Hapana muchengeti, hapana mumiriri.

recipient.imageAlt: Mufananidzo wokumusoro wezviuru zvevapikise vakaunganidzwa pausiku padare reguta nemwenje mitsvuku inopfuta, pasi peronde 'UNITY IN DARKNESS' yakatumirwa pamigovera
recipient.title: Wana mari pasina mvumo.
recipient.description: Gamuchira rutsigiro zvakananga kubva kuvanhu vanotenda mukuda kwako. Hapana akaundi yebhanga, hapana fomu yekukumbira, hapana kambani pakati.
recipient.bullet1: Tanga kugamuchira zvipo pakarepo kana waitsa.

what-is-ditto.question: Chii chinonzi {{appName}}?
answer: {{appName}} ipuratifomu yekutumira zvipo zveGrin zvakananga kuvagamuchiri. Hapana mukuvadzi wepakati, hapana mubati wemari, uye hapana akaundi rinogona kurambidzwa.
{{appName}} yakavakwa pamusoro peNostr, saka hunhu hwako hahubatani nehurongwa hweno — iwe une humambo hwacho.

cost-to-use.question: Ko {{appName}} ine mutengo here?
answer: **Aiwa.** {{appName}} haitori mari yepuratifomu. Paunopa chipo, unobhadhara chete mari shoma yenetiweki yeGrin inoenda kuvachera, kwete kwatiri.

who-made-this.question: Ndiani akagadzira {{appName}}?
answer: {{appName}} yakavakwa ne[Soapbox](https://soapbox.pub), boka rakavhura kodhi rinogadzira maturusi enzvimbo yeNostr, vachishanda pamwe ne[World Liberty Congress](https://worldlibertycongress.org/).

censorship-resistance.question: "Kushinga kucensorship" pano kunorevei?
answer: Hapana kambani inomira pakati pemupi nemugamuchiri. {{appName}} haichengete mari uye haigone kurambidza kero.
Kana netiweki yeGrin ichishanda, zvipo zvinogona kutumirwa uye kugamuchirwa. Kunyange {{appName}} pachayo kana ikamisikidzwa, hazvigone kuzvimisa.

why-onchain.question: Sei Grin?
answer: Grin imari yedhijitari ine kuvanzika kwakavakirwa mukati. Magadzirirwo ayo eMimblewimble haaise makero pacheni uye anoviga huwandu hwega hwega, saka zvipo hazvisiye nzira yepachena inosiiwa nemamwe macryptocurrency mazhinji.

Pa{{appName}}, makambeni anogamuchira Grin nenzira mbiri: kuburikidza neGoblinPay (skena QR uye mubhadharo unofamba kuenda kukambeni seslatepack yakavharidzirwa nepaNostr) kana zvakananga kukero yekambeni yegrin1 Slatepack kubva muchikwama chero chipi cheGrin. Chero nzira ipi, mari inosvika muchikwama chinodzorwa nekambeni.

Huwandu hwemakambeni hunoramba huri hwechokwadi pasina kurasa kuvanzika ikoko: mupi anogona kuburitsa uchapupu hwemubhadharo, uye {{appName}} inohuongorora ichienzanisa neGrin node kusimbisa kuti chibvumirano chiri pacheni zvechokwadi. Uchapupu hunoburitsa huwandu nekernel yechibvumirano chete, kwete kuti ndiani akabhadhara. Bhuku reMupi nereMugamuchiri zvinotsanangura zvizere.

why-not-rotating-addresses.question: Sei {{appName}} isingagadzirise zvipo paseva yayo pachayo?
answer: Kuita izvi kungada kuti {{appName}} ishande semumiririri wepakati anotsinhanisa mari, otanga achichengeta Grin ozoitakurira kumugamuchiri.
Izvi zvingatiita vatumiri vemari, tiri pasi pemitemo inouya nazvo, uye nzvimbo imwe yekukundikana: vhara seva ye{{appName}} wabva wavhara chipo chega chega chinopfuura nemairi.

Pachinzvimbo chacho, zvipo zvinofamba kubva muchikwama cheGrin chemupi zvichienda muchikwama cheGrin chekambeni. Kambeni yega yega inoburitsa kero yayo yegrin1 Slatepack kana GoblinPay checkout, {{appName}} haitombobati mari, uye puratifomu pachayo haigone kuvharwa kurambidza chero ani zvake. Uye nokuti Grin haiise makero pacheni, zvipo hazvibatanidziki sezvakajairika pasina munhu anobata mari pakati.

why-not-other-crypto.question: Sei kwete Bitcoin, Monero, kana imwe cryptocurrency?
answer: Bitcoin ndiyo cryptocurrency inoshandiswa zvakanyanya, asi bhuku rayo nderepachena: chipo kukero inozivikanwa chinobudisa huwandu, nguva, uye rutivi runotumira, nokusingaperi. Kuwedzera kuvanzika pamusoro payo kunoreva zvishandiso zvekuwedzera, matanho ekuwedzera, uye nzira dzakawanda dzekukanganisa. Kuzvipo zvezvikonzero zvine njodzi, iyo isarudzo yakashata yekutanga.

Grin inoita kuti nzira yakavanzika ive iyo nzira yega. Mimblewimble haisiye makero pacheni uye inoviga huwandu hwega hwega, saka vapi havadi zvishandiso zvakakosha kuti vachengeteke. Panguva imwecheteyo, uchapupu hwemibhadharo hweGrin hunobvumira kambeni kuratidza huwandu hwakaongororwa pacheni pasina kubudisa vapi vayo. Monero inopawo kuvanzika kwakasimba, asi uchapupu hwemibhadharo hweGrin hunoenderana nemuenzaniso we{{appName}} wezvipo zvakaongororwa, uye cheni yayo yakareruka inoita kuti kuongorora kurambe kuri nyore.

what-is-nostr.question: Nostr chii?
answer: Nostr inetiweki yakavhurika apo **iwe** uri muridzi weakaundi yako, kwete kambani. Hunhu hwako kiyi yekrptiografi yaunodzora, kwete zita remushandisi paseva yemumwe munhu.

Pa{{appName}}, kiyi imwecheteyo inosaina makambeni ako nemarisiti ezvipo anovaka huwandu hwako hwakaongororwa, ndicho chikonzero hunhu hwako nemakambeni ako zvichishanda chero kupi paNostr pasina kunyoresa kune chero ani.

why-login-different.question: Sei kupinda kwangu kwakasiyana uye kurefu zvakadai?
answer: Panzvimbo pezita remushandisi nemupasiwedhi yakadzorwa nekambani, Nostr inoshandisa peya yemakiyi ekriptiografi.
"Kiyi yako yepachena" (inotanga ne**npub**) izita rako remushandisi. "Kiyi yako yakavanzika" (inotanga ne**nsec**) ipasiwedhi yako. Tambo refu ndiyo inoita kuti iyi isagona kufungidzirwa zvakananga.

lose-secret-key.question: Chii chinoitika kana ndikarasa kiyi yangu yakavanzika?
answer: **Hapana bhatani re"wakanganwa pasiwedhi".** Hapana anogona kuiseta zvekare kwauri. Kana wairasa, akaundi yako nemakambeni ako zvaperera nokusingaperi. (Mari yako yeGrin inogara muchikwama chako cheGrin nemutsara wayo weseed, zvakaparadzana nekiyi iyi.)
**Chengeta kiyi yako yakavanzika kunzvimbo yakachengeteka iye zvino.** Kuti uone mazano, verenga [Kutarisira Makey ako eNostr](https://soapbox.pub/blog/managing-nostr-keys).

manage-secret-key.question: Ndinogona here kuchengeta kiyi yangu yakavanzika muchengeti yemapasiwedhi yefoni yangu?
answer: Hongu. Unogona kuyichengeta muchengeti yemapasiwedhi yedhivhaisi yako (iCloud Keychain, 1Password, Bitwarden, n.z.v.). PaiPhone, kuyichengeta muPasswords kunokupa mukana wekushandisa Face ID kana Touch ID kupinda.
Kuti uwane bhuku rakazara, ona [Kutarisira Makey ako eNostr](https://soapbox.pub/blog/managing-nostr-keys).

fyp.question: Feed inoshanda sei?
answer: Feed yako inoratidza makambeni nemaposts kubva kuvanhu vaunotevera. Hapana algorithm inosarudza zvaunoona.

what-are-relays.question: MaRelays chii?
answer: MaRelays ndiwo maseva anochengeta uye anodelivha zviitiko zveNostr — maposts, marisiti echipo, ruzivo rwepurofiri. Zvirongwa zvepiyasi zvinoshanda kubva pakutanga; unogona kuwedzera kana kubvisa relays muSettings > Network.

what-are-blossom.question: MaServers eBlossom chii?
answer: MaServers eBlossom anochengeta mafaira emedia (mafananidzo emakambeni, mafananidzo emapurofiri) paunoaupload. Unogona kutarisira maservers aunoshandisa muSettings > Network.

report-content.question: Ndingareporta sei zvinhu zvinokuvadza?
answer: Vhura menu yemadhoti matatu (**...**) papost ipi zvayo wosarudza "Report." Unogona kuchamira kana kuvharira vashandisi kubva kumenu rimwechetero.

vs-mastodon-bluesky.question: Nostr yakasiyana sei neMastodon kana Bluesky?
answer: PaMastodon, akaundi yako iri paseva yakati. PaBluesky, maakaundi mazhinji anotsamira pakambani imwechete. PaNostr, hunhu hwako ikiyi yaunodzora, uye profile yako nemakambeni ako zvinoenda newe kuapp ipi zvayo yeNostr.

profile-fields.question: Magedhi epurofiri chii?
answer: Magedhi epurofiri anokupa mukana wekuwedzera ruzivo runonyatso pakupurofiri yako — masaini, makero emawalleti, mhumhutsi, mifananidzo, mavhidhio.

tldr.lede: Ipa chipo kubva muchikwama chero chipi cheGrin: skena QR yeGoblinPay yekambeni, kana ubhadhare kero yayo yegrin1 Slatepack. Grin yakavanzika sezvakajairika, saka chipo chako hachisiye nzira yepachena.
nextActions: Bhadhara kubva muchikwama chero chipi cheGrin

openCampaign.title: Vhura kambeni
openCampaign.body: Dzvanya Donate wosarudza nzira. GoblinPay: isa huwandu, skena QR nechikwama cheGoblin, uye mubhadharo unofamba kuenda kukambeni seslatepack yakavharidzirwa nepaNostr, nekusimbiswa kunozviitira. Kero yeGrin: bhadhara kero yekambeni yegrin1 Slatepack kubva muchikwama chero chipi cheGrin; chikwama chako ndicho chinofambisa, kuburikidza neTor kana nekutsinhanisa maslatepack.

arrivesDirectly.title: Inosvika zvakananga
arrivesDirectly.body: Mari inogadziriswa zvakananga muchikwama chekambeni. {{appName}} haichengete kana kuifambisa. Kana uchida kuti chipo chako chiverengwe muhuwandu hwepachena hwekambeni, buritsa uchapupu hwemubhadharo kana risiti mushure; hunoburitsa huwandu chete, kwete hunhu hwako.

publicVisible.title: Zviri pachena, nezvisiri
publicVisible.body: Cheni yeGrin haina makero uye inoviga huwandu hwese, saka vatariri vekunze havagone kuona kuti ndiani akapa kambeni kana kuti zvakadini. Huwandu hwekambeni pa{{appName}} hunovakwa chete kubva kuuchapupu nemarisiti zvinosarudzwa kuburitswa nevapi, uye chimwe nechimwe chinoburitsa huwandu nekernel yechibvumirano chete.

privacy.heading: Kupa chipo chakavanzika
privacy.intro: Pacheni, Grin inotokuchengetedza: hapana makero, huwandu hwakavanzwa, hapana runyorwa rwevapi rwepachena. Chinogona kuchikuzivisa ndeyekuti wakawana sei Grin uye zvaunosarudza kuburitsa. Kana njodzi yako iri pamusoro, matanho aya akakodzera. Sarudza rimwe, kana uabatanidze.

nonKyc.name: Wana Grin pasina KYC
nonKyc.purpose: Ichere, kana uitenge peer-to-peer, kuti mari yacho isabatanidzwa nechitupa chako chehurumende kubva pakutanga.

coinjoin.name: Rega risiti yepachena
coinjoin.purpose: Kuburitsa uchapupu hwemubhadharo kunobatanidza chipo nehunhu hwako hweNostr. Usahuburitse, uye chipo chinosara pakati pako nekambeni.

consumerApps.title: Maexchange anoziva kuti ndiwe ani
consumerApps.body: Maexchange anotengesa GRIN anosimbisa chitupa chako uye anochengeta zvinyorwa zvekubvisa kwega kwega. Cheni yepachena haizoratidza chipo chako, asi exchange inoziva kwakaenda kubvisa kwayo. Kana izvozvo zvichikosha pamamiriro ako, tanga wabvisa kuenda kuchikwama chaunodzora wozopa uchibva ipapo.

tldr.lede: Buritsa kero yegrin1 Slatepack kubva muchikwama cheGrin chaunodzora, kana ugadzire GoblinPay checkout. Zvipo zvinosvika kubva kuchikwama kuenda kuchikwama. {{appName}} haitombochengeti mari yako.

howReceiving.heading: Kugashira kunoshanda sei
paragraphs: Zvipo pa{{appName}} zvinofamba zvakananga kubva muchikwama cheGrin chemupi zvichienda mune chako. Paunogadzira kambeni, unosarudza magamuchirire:

**Kero yegrin1 Slatepack.** Chikwama chero chipi cheGrin (Goblin, grin-wallet) chinokupa imwe. Vapi vanoibhadhara kubva muchikwama chero chipi cheGrin, vachidyidzana kuburikidza neTor kana nekutsinhanisa maslatepack; zvikwama ndizvo zvinofambisa.

**GoblinPay.** Checkout inobvumira vapi kubhadhara mukati meapp: vanoskena QR uye mubhadharo unofamba uchiuya kwauri seslatepack yakavharidzirwa uye yakaputirwa sechipo nepaNostr, nekusimbiswa kunozviitira uye risiti yakasainwa pakupedzisira.

**Zvese.** Vapi vane chikwama cheGoblin vanowana nzira yekuskena kamwechete, uye vamwe vese vanobhadhara kero yako yeSlatepack kubva muchikwama chero chipi cheGrin chavanoshandisa. Kupa zvese kunokuchengeta wakavhurika kumupi wese.

Kuvanzika ndiko kwakajairika nenzira dzese. Magadzirirwo eMimblewimble eGrin haaise makero pacheni uye anoviga huwandu hwega hwega, saka zvipo zvako hazvimboonekwa mubhuku ripi zvaro repachena rinogona kutariswa nemunhu wese.

Huwandu hwakaongororwa hwekambeni yako hunoverenga chipo kana uchapupu hwacho hwemubhadharo kana risiti yeGoblinPay zvaburitswa uye zvaongororwa: siginecha yemugamuchiri inofanira kusimbiswa, uye kernel yechibvumirano inofanira kusimbiswa pacheni ichienzaniswa neGrin node. Uchapupu hwega hwega hwakaburitswa hunoburitsa huwandu nekernel, hapana chimwe pamusoro pemupi.

whatEveryoneSees.heading: Zvinoonekwa nemunhu wese
paragraphs: Vashanyi vanoona peji yekambeni yako, chinangwa chayo, uye huwandu hwakaongororwa hwakavakwa kubva kuuchapupu nemarisiti akasarudzwa kuburitswa nevapi. Chimwe nechimwe chacho chinoburitsa huwandu nekernel yechibvumirano, kwete hunhu hwemupi.

Hapana anogona kutsvaga bharanzi yako kana nhoroondo yezvipo pacheni. Hapana kero yekuongorora uye hapana huwandu hwekuverenga; kunze kwemarisiti akaburitswa, vanhu vanongoona zvaunogovera pamusoro pemafambiro ekambeni.

sweep.title: Zvipo zvinopinda muchikwama chaunodzora
sweep.body: {{appName}} haitombokufambisiri chikwama. Mari inosvika muchikwama cheGrin chine kero kana GoblinPay checkout yawakaburitsa, saka kuchengeta ndekwako kubva pachipo chekutanga chaicho. Izvozvo zvinorevawo kuti mutoro ndewako: munhu wese ane mutsara weseed wechikwama chako ane mari yacho, uye pasina iwo mari haigone kudzoswa.

dontSit.title: Chengetedza mutsara weseed uri offline
dontSit.body: Zvikuru kumakambeni ane mari yakawanda, chengeta mutsara weseed wechikwama chako cheGrin uri offline (papepa, pasimbi, kana mupassword manager pamuchina wakatsaurirwa). Seed ndiyo chikwama: chengetedza mazwi uye watova nechechengeto yakatonhora (cold storage).

cashout.heading: Kukwidza mari
cashout.intro: Cheni yeGrin haizobudisa zvipo zvako, saka sarudzo huru yekuvanzika ndeyekuti unoshandura sei kuenda kumari yenyika yako. Sevhisi ipi zvayo inosimbisa chitupa chako ichaziva zvaunokwidza kuburikidza nayo. Sarudzo dziri pasi apa dzine kutarisana kwakasiyana.

coinjoin.name: Maexchange
coinjoin.purpose: Nzira iri nyore pane dzese yekuenda kufiat. Tarisira KYC: exchange inoziva hunhu hwako nehuwandu hwaunokwidza kuburikidza nayo.

peerToPeer.name: Peer-to-peer
peerToPeer.purpose: Tsinhanisa Grin nefiat zvakananga neumwe munhu kana kuburikidza nebroker. Hapana puratifomu pakati.

spendDirectly.name: Ishandise zvakananga
spendDirectly.purpose: Shandisa Grin semari kuvatengesi nemasevhisi anoigamuchira, pasina kutanga washandura kuita mari.

tumblers.title: Hapana mamixer anodiwa
tumblers.body: PaGrin hapana matumbler kana masevhisi ekusanganisa anofanira kuvimbwa, uye hausi kuada. Mimblewimble inoviga huwandu uye haisiye makero pacheni, saka zvipo zvakavanzika sezvakajairika.
